title: Package Design, Modules, Versions, Workspaces, and Dependency Provenance · Go Semantics Case: Package Api Layout
summary: A team must split a command and library, publish a stable module, test a two-module workspace, and review dependency changes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go package api layout increment in a versioned multi-package module plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Organize commands, internal packages, public packages, names, imports, cycles, and documentation around cohesive APIs.
Reproduce the smallest failure, identify its causal layer, repair it, and retain a test or invariant over changed input.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
